title: God's Presence.
content:
God's evident, and may be said to be
    Present with just men, to the verity;
    But with the wicked if He doth comply,
    'Tis, as St. Bernard saith, but seemingly.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "God's Presence."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
